hooks.command: state=running; encoded=$(printf %s "$state" | base64); if [ -n "${TMUX:-}" ]; then printf '\033Ptmux;\033\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007\033\\' ai_cli_state "$encoded" > /dev/tty; else printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' ai_cli_state "$encoded" > /dev/tty; fi

state=waiting; encoded=$(printf %s "$state" | base64); if [ -n "${TMUX:-}" ]; then printf '\033Ptmux;\033\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007\033\\' ai_cli_state "$encoded" > /dev/tty; else printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=%s=%s\007' ai_cli_state "$encoded" > /dev/tty; fi
